name: P-2 at least one dataset ships per agent with prompt_id declared in the agent frontmatter
command: node -e 'const fs=require("fs");const path=require("path");const adir=process.env.CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT+"/agents";const ddir=process.env.CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT+"/evals/datasets/agents";const ds=new Set(fs.readdirSync(ddir).map(n=>n.replace(/\.jsonl$/,"")));process.exit(ds.size>=1?0:1)' && echo ok 1>&2
